title: Create new account and land on initialized dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign up from /auth and is redirected to the dashboard after account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign up mode
Fill text "Owner TC001" into the owner name field
Fill text "owner.tc001+{{timestamp}}@example.com" into the email field
Fill text "ValidPass123!" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard overview metrics are displayed

title: Sign in with existing credentials redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in from /auth with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify recent transactions and recent debts sections are displayed

title: Sign in with incorrect password shows error and stays on auth page
description: Verifies invalid credentials show an authentication error and do not navigate away from /auth.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "WrongPassword!" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the authentication page

title: Sign out from authenticated area redirects to auth
description: Verifies a signed-in user can sign out and is redirected back to /auth.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Open the account panel
Trigger the sign out action
Verify the user is redirected to the authentication page
Verify the authentication form is displayed

title: Switching between sign in and sign up preserves being on auth screen
description: Verifies toggling between modes works and the appropriate fields for each mode are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign up mode
Fill text "Owner TC005" into the owner name field
Toggle to the sign in mode
Toggle to the sign up mode
Verify the owner name field is available in the current mode
Verify the email and password fields are displayed

title: Accessing dashboard while unauthenticated redirects to auth
description: Verifies the dashboard route is protected and redirects unauthenticated users to /auth.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is redirected to the authentication page
Verify the authentication form is displayed

title: Dashboard loads primary overview content after login
description: Verifies the dashboard renders key summary cards and recent activity for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Verify dashboard overview metrics are displayed
Verify latest transaction details and recent debt entries are displayed

title: Navigate from dashboard to POS using sidebar or menu
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the dashboard to the POS screen via in-app navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Open the main navigation menu
Click the navigation item for the POS page
Verify the POS product list is displayed
Verify the cart area is displayed

title: Complete a POS checkout with a single product and valid payment method
description: Verifies the end-to-end cashier flow can add an item, choose a payment method, and complete checkout with a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Click the navigation item for the POS page
Add the first available product to the cart
Select the Tunai payment method
Complete checkout
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the cart is cleared after successful checkout

title: POS prevents checkout with an empty cart
description: Verifies validation blocks completing a transaction when no items are in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Click the navigation item for the POS page
Complete checkout
Verify a validation error preventing checkout is visible
Verify no items are shown in the cart

title: POS search and category filtering updates product results
description: Verifies product discovery via keyword search and category chip filtering changes the displayed product list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Click the navigation item for the POS page
Fill text "a" into the product search field
Select a category filter chip
Verify the product list shows results matching the active search and filter state

title: Adjust cart line quantity and remove item updates cart state
description: Verifies quantity controls and removal work and the cart updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to the sign in mode
Fill text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Fill text "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Submit the auth form
Click the navigation item for the POS page
Add the first available product to the cart
Increase the quantity for the cart line item
Remove the cart line item
Verify the cart shows no items

title: Add a new product and verify it appears in inventory list
description: Creates a new inventory product via the add-product flow and verifies it is listed afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Test Product A
Fill valid values into the remaining product fields including category, buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, and description
Save the new product
Verify the inventory list contains the product name Test Product A

title: Search products by name and see matching results
description: Searches the inventory list by a known product name and verifies the list filters to show it.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Searchable Product B
Fill valid values into the remaining product fields including category, buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, and description
Save the new product
Search products by name with Searchable Product B
Verify the inventory list contains the product name Searchable Product B

title: Edit an existing product and verify updated data is shown
description: Updates an existing product using the edit flow and verifies the updated product name is reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Editable Product C
Fill valid values into the remaining product fields including category, buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, and description
Save the new product
Search products by name with Editable Product C
Open the edit flow for the product
Fill in the product name field with Editable Product C Updated
Save changes
Verify the inventory list contains the product name Editable Product C Updated

title: Restock an existing product and verify stock increases
description: Restocks a product and verifies that the displayed stock value increases afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Restockable Product D
Fill valid values into the remaining product fields including category, buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, and description
Save the new product
Search products by name with Restockable Product D
Record the current stock shown for the product
Open the restock flow for the product
Fill a valid stock increase amount into the restock amount field
Submit the restock
Verify the stock shown for Restockable Product D is higher than it was before restocking

title: Prevent creating a product with missing required fields
description: Attempts to create a product without required fields and verifies a validation error is shown and the product is not added.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Invalid Product E
Leave at least one required field empty
Attempt to save the new product
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the inventory list does not contain the product name Invalid Product E

title: Prevent updating a product with missing required fields
description: Attempts to update a product while clearing a required field and verifies a validation error and no update is applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Required Field Product F
Fill valid values into the remaining product fields including category, buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, and description
Save the new product
Search products by name with Required Field Product F
Open the edit flow for the product
Clear a required field value
Attempt to save changes
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the inventory list contains the product name Required Field Product F

title: Search by category or notes and verify results update
description: Creates a product with a distinctive category or note, searches by that value, and verifies the product appears in results.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation link to open the inventory page
Open the add-product flow
Fill in the product name field with Categorized Product G
Fill in the category field with Category-G
Fill valid values into the remaining product fields including buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, and description
Save the new product
Search products by category or notes with Category-G
Verify the inventory list contains the product name Categorized Product G

title: Update and persist store profile settings
description: Verifies a user can edit store profile fields, save changes, and see them persist after a reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Fill Unique Store Name TC001 into the store name field
Fill Unique Tagline TC001 into the store tagline field
Fill Bandung into the city field
Fill Jalan Test TC001 into the address field
Fill Owner TC001 into the owner name field
Fill a valid WhatsApp number into the owner WhatsApp field
Fill Business notes TC001 into the business notes field
Save the profile changes
Reload the page
Verify the store name field shows Unique Store Name TC001
Verify the owner name field shows Owner TC001

title: Toggle payment methods and persist selection after reload
description: Verifies enabled payment methods can be toggled and the selection persists after saving and reloading.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Toggle one payment method option
Toggle a different payment method option
Save the profile changes
Reload the page
Verify the enabled payment method selection reflects the last saved toggles

title: Change stock alert threshold and persist after reload
description: Verifies the stock alert threshold can be updated, saved, and persists after reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Fill 7 into the stock alert threshold field
Save the profile changes
Reload the page
Verify the stock alert threshold field shows 7

title: Validate required owner name prevents saving
description: Verifies saving is blocked and a validation error is shown when owner name is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Fill 9 into the stock alert threshold field
Clear the owner name field
Save the profile changes
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for the owner name
Verify the stock alert threshold field does not show 9 after the save attempt

title: Workspace reset restores defaults and reloads app state
description: Verifies the user can reset the workspace and the app returns to default seeded state after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Fill Unique Store Name TC005 into the store name field
Fill Owner TC005 into the owner name field
Save the profile changes
Click the workspace reset action to restore initial data
Confirm the workspace reset intent
Wait for the reset process to complete
Verify the store name is no longer Unique Store Name TC005
Verify the owner name is no longer Owner TC005

title: Settings page loads primary content for authenticated user
description: Verifies the settings page loads and shows profile, payment, and reset sections for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Verify store profile settings fields are displayed
Verify workspace reset controls are displayed

title: Edits are not persisted without saving
description: Verifies unsaved changes are not persisted after a reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /pengaturan
Fill Unsaved Store Name TC007 into the store name field
Reload the page
Verify the store name field is not Unsaved Store Name TC007
